wins: Strong operational sales growth in Innovative Medicine and MedTech
Positive Phase III readouts for multiple in-line and pipeline medicines
Successful integration of Abiomed and recent acquisition of Laminar
High expectations for 2024 data readouts for key assets
Confidence in 2024 guidance and long-term financial targets
risks: Negative impact from loss of exclusivity of ZYTIGA in Europe
Potential headwinds from STELARA biosimilars in Europe
Impact of Russia sanctions on international sales
Uncertainty around currency movements affecting sales growth
